recommendations.title: Kickboxer 4: The Aggressor
recommendations.overview: David Sloan must travel to Mexico to save his wife from a savage international terrorist.

recommendations.title: Cyborg
recommendations.overview: A martial artist hunts a killer in a plague-infested urban dump of the future.

recommendations.title: Nemesis
recommendations.overview: In the future, chaos is rampant as 'information terrorists' threaten to destroy order in society. Alex is a part-man, part-machine LAPD cop who is the best at what he does. When one of the terrorists calls him a machine, Alex questions his humanity a

recommendations.title: The Sword and the Sorcerer
recommendations.overview: A mercenary with a three-bladed sword rediscovers his royal heritage when he is recruited to help a princess foil a brutal tyrant and a powerful sorcerer's plans to conquer the land.

recommendations.title: Kickboxer 2: The Road Back
recommendations.overview: In this rousing sequel to Kickboxer, Tong Po broods about his defeat at the hands of Kurt Sloan. Po and his managers resort to drastic measures to goad Kurt's brother into the ring for a rematch.

recommendations.title: Colors
recommendations.overview: A confident young cop is shown the ropes by a veteran partner in the dangerous gang-controlled barrios of Los Angeles, where the gang culture is enforced by the colors the members wear.

recommendations.title: Casino Royale
recommendations.overview: Le Chiffre, a banker to the world's terrorists, is scheduled to participate in a high-stakes poker game in Montenegro, where he intends to use his winnings to establish his financial grip on the terrorist market. M sends Bond—on his maiden mission as

recommendations.title: The Warriors
recommendations.overview: Prominent gang leader Cyrus calls a meeting of New York's gangs to set aside their turf wars and take over the city. At the meeting, a rival leader kills Cyrus, but a Coney Island gang called the Warriors is wrongly blamed for Cyrus' death. Before yo

recommendations.title: Hell Ride
recommendations.overview: Two rival bikers gangs, the Victors and the Six-Six-Six's, refuel their decades-old rivalry.

recommendations.title: The Delta Force
